title: astragalus castetteri
intro: Astragalus castetteri, also known as Castetter's milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus castetteri include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, making it a potential treatment for various conditions such as arthritis and respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, Astragalus castetteri is often consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and its dried roots and leaves can also be used in infusions and decoctions.
